scope: ACL main-paper visual and prose polish focused on the Related Work to Method transition.
changes: Compressed Related Work background text while preserving citations and claim boundaries.
Added a Method framing paragraph that separates the conversion intervention from downstream evidence gates.
Rewrote the Method evidence-gate paragraphs as Gate 1 through Gate 4.
Rebuilt and visually reviewed pages 3, 4, 9, and 10.

visual_findings.before: Method began low in the right column and entered directly into the first subsection.
visual_findings.after: Method begins earlier with a short framing paragraph, followed by a readable 3.1 subsection.

visual_findings.before: Evidence Gates, Claim Registry, and Results shared the page but were dense.
visual_findings.after: The page remains dense but contained, with Results opening cleanly after Claim Registry.
Figure 4, caption, Ethical Considerations, and References remain separated with no caption or column collision.

verification.result: ok true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract 183 words

verification.command: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k 'acl_method_avoids_narrow_column_monospace_evidence_path or acl_main_forces_results_floats_before_discussion or acl_results_avoids_page_break_prone_original_nomdl_phrase or acl_intro_uses_latest_low_text_method_chain_schematic'

rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|LaTeX Warning: Reference|Warning:.*Label|undefined|Rerun to get|Label\\(s\\) may have changed|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

residual_risk: The long-running main-paper polish goal remains active. Page 9 Conclusion still starts low in the left column, but the final visual render shows enough text before continuation and page 10 remains collision-free.
